texto: Hurricanes are dangerous things, and they're no fun to go through. And if you come out of it in one piece and your house comes out of in one piece, it's no fun living with no electricity for a day or a week, a month, whatever it is. And I speak, unfortunately, from personal experience on that matter.
explicacao: Citação de Bernard Goldberg sobre temas ligados a vida. “Hurricanes are dangerous things, and they're no fun to go through. And if you come out of it in o…” articula vida, day, fun em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como fun e speak.

frase_original: Hurricanes are dangerous things, and they're no fun to go through. And if you come out of it in one piece and your house comes out of in one piece, it's no fun living with no electricity for a day or a week, a month, whatever it is. And I speak, unfortunately, from personal experience on that matter.
